item.title: F-014: Custom Themes and Fonts
item.intent: Personalization deepens attachment to the tool — users should be able to make easy-markdown feel like theirs
item.description: 3-5 built-in color themes with light and dark variants each. Font selection from curated list (we control quality). Font size adjustment. Theme preview before committing. Settings persist via UserDefaults. All themes meet WCAG AA contrast ratios.
acceptanceCriteria: User selects a different theme and font — entire editor updates immediately
All themes pass WCAG AA contrast check
Theme preview shows the effect on editor content before committing the selection
